productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's MJ Black White Shoe
description: The simple design of these numero uno shoes come with edgy attitude. The sturdy yet comfortable design takes you through the day in style. These look good when teamed up with jeans and tees for casual outings.The shoes come soft fabric covers for easy storage.Upper Synthetic upper with stitch detailing for re-inforcement and as an added design detail Suede panel over toe counter and heel counter Lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for extra comfort Logo branding on the tongue, side and behind collar Contrast colour overlays on the sides for re-inforcement and as design detail Subliminal star print around the heel counter Midsole EVA injected phylon midsole for light weight feel and all day comfort Outsole Outsole made of crabon rubber for extra grip Ridged pattern around the perimeter of the footbed for total grip Circular lugs for added grip Pivot point on the big toe mound for flexible movement of the foot shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
